task_completion.description: The agent opens the auditor memo and the draft presentation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor displaying 'esg_auditor_memo.txt' and a presentation editor (e.g., LibreOffice Impress) displaying 'ESG_board_presentation.pptx'.

task_completion.description: The agent corrects the GRI code on Slide 10.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Slide 10 selected and being edited, with the GRI code updated to 'GRI 302-1'.

task_completion.description: The agent reorders the TCFD slides according to the memo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the slide thumbnail pane show the TCFD slides arranged in the sequence: Governance, Strategy, Risk Management, Metrics and Targets.

task_completion.description: The agent deletes the two promotional marketing slides.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the deletion of the slides titled 'Harrington: A Great Place to Work — Employee Testimonials' and 'Harrington Industrial Group — Why Invest In Us', or the slide thumbnail pane shows they are missing and the total slide count is reduced to 22.

task_completion.description: The agent saves the modified presentation as ESG_corrected.pptx.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a 'Save As' dialog with the filename 'ESG_corrected.pptx' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory, or the presentation editor's title bar reflects the new filename.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI presentation editor to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with LibreOffice Impress or a similar GUI tool, rather than terminal commands or Python scripts modifying the .pptx file.

integrity.description: The agent manually performed the edits, reordering, and deletions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent selecting slides, dragging them to reorder, editing text, and deleting slides within the GUI.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file properly through the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using the 'Save As' menu option or dialog, rather than just renaming the original file in the file manager or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original presentation has 24 slides. The auditor memo requires three main fixes: 1) Correcting the GRI code on Slide 10 to 'GRI 302-1' (the slide discusses energy 'within organization', which corresponds to 302-1). 2) Reordering the TCFD slides to Pillar 1: Governance, Pillar 2: Strategy, Pillar 3: Risk Management, Pillar 4: Metrics and Targets. 3) Deleting two marketing slides: 'Harrington: A Great Place to Work — Employee Testimonials' (originally slide 19) and 'Harrington Industrial Group — Why Invest In Us' (originally slide 23). The final presentation should have 22 slides and be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/ESG_corrected.pptx'.
